service.description: Save (or create) an ADK agent config and register it in the runtime registry. Multiple configs can be active simultaneously — one per ownerPartyId (tenant). Authentication is enforced at the servlet level (/adk/* requires AdkUsers/ADMIN).

set.from: instruction ?: 'You are a helpful assistant for the GrowERP ERP system.'

actions.script: org.moqui.adk.AdkManager.initSessionService(ec.factory) org.moqui.adk.AdkManager.initConfig( adkAgentConfigId, savedCfg.ownerPartyId ?: null, savedCfg.agentName ?: null, savedCfg.modelName ?: 'gemini-2.5-flash', savedCfg.instruction ?: '', resolvedApiKey, savedCfg.llmProvider ?: 'gemini', savedCfg.description ?: null )

service.description: Create a new ADK chat session for the current user.
Send a message to the ADK agent and return its text reply.
